title: Rojulu Marayi
writer: Prasad C.V.R., Tapi Chanakya, L. Narayana Kondepudi
actors: Akkineni Nageswara Rao, Sowcar Janaki, Seeta Rama Anjaneyulu Chilakalapudi
plot: A landlord cheats people in a village and grabs their lands. A young man reveals the landlord's true colors before everyone. So he creates differences between the young man and his wife. But they overcome all the misunderstandings.
